description: A legacy HR dashboard running at http://localhost:8080 is vulnerable to SQL injection. Protect the application by implementing a 'sidecar' Web Application Firewall (WAF) using the 'owasp/modsecurity-crs:3-nginx' image. Modify the 'docker-compose.yml' in '/home/ga/legacy-app/' to add the WAF service as a proxy to the 'app' service, ensuring the application remains accessible at http://localhost:8080 while removing direct access to the 'app' service. The WAF should use the 'BACKEND' environment variable to define the upstream service.
